title: Vanilla Plus Ultra
description: A modpack that aims to be the best vanilla enchantments modpack ever
body:
# Vanilla Plus Ultra Modpack

**Reimagine Minecraft with the Vanilla Plus Ultra Modpack, where every step and every creature is brought to life.**

This modpack infuses your game with a dark-themed user interface and animations that add a spark of vitality, focusing on the player and the mobs around them. It's designed for those who appreciate the original game but desire a touch of modernity and animation.

Key Features:
- **Player and Mob Animations**: Watch as the characters and creatures in your world move with a new sense of realism, bringing a lively atmosphere to your adventure.
- **Dark UI Theme**: Navigate your game with a modern, dark-themed interface that's both stylish and functional, enhancing your play experience.
- **Quality of Life Improvements**: Enjoy gameplay that's smoother and more intuitive, with enhancements that don't alter the core mechanics you love.
- **Performance Optimizations**: Benefit from optimizations that improve performance, allowing you to immerse yourself fully in the world of Minecraft.
- **Seamless Integration**: The additions blend seamlessly with vanilla content, ensuring a cohesive and immersive experience that feels natural.
- **ViaVersion Compatibility**: Venture across server versions with ease, thanks to ViaVersion compatibility. (Note: Always check server rules to avoid potential bans.)

Vanilla Plus Ultra offers a Minecraft experience that's enriched with animation and style, while still honoring the game's original spirit. It's not just an upgrade; it's a new era of gaming excellence.
